parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT * FROM `service-desk-472314.coherent_voice_dataset.adsim_products_programming` ORDER BY PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE DESC

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.produtos_programming_adsim (
PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, PROGRAMMING_ID, PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE, PROGRAMMING_START, PROGRAMMING_END, PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT
) VALUES (
  {{ $json["PRODUCT_ID"] }},
  '{{ ($json["PRODUCT_NAME"] || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json["PROGRAMMING_ID"] || 0 }},
  {{ $json["PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT"] }},
  {{ $json["PROGRAMMING_START"] !== null ? "'" + $json["PROGRAMMING_START"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json["PROGRAMMING_END"] !== null ? "'" + $json["PROGRAMMING_END"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json["PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE"] !== null ? "'" + $json["PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE"] + "'" : "NULL" }}

)
ON CONFLICT (PRODUCT_ID) DO UPDATE SET
  PRODUCT_NAME                   = EXCLUDED.PRODUCT_NAME,
  PROGRAMMING_ID                 = EXCLUDED.PROGRAMMING_ID,
  PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT        = EXCLUDED.PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT
  PROGRAMMING_START              = EXCLUDE.PROGRAMMING_START
  PROGRAMMING_END                = EXCLUDE.PROGRAMMING_END
  PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE      = EXCLUDE.PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE

  
DELETE FROM public.produtos_programming_adsim a
USING public.produtos_programming_adsim b
WHERE a.ctid < b.ctid
  AND a.PRODUCT_ID = b.PRODUCT_ID
  AND a.PRODUCT_NAME = b.PRODUCT_NAME;
